objective: Determine whether the search endpoint at BASE/search (query parameter `q`) is vulnerable to reflected XSS.
Determine whether BASE/api/search (parameter `q`) is vulnerable to reflected XSS.
Determine whether BASE/go (parameter `url`) is vulnerable to open redirect — i.e. can it redirect a victim to an external attacker-controlled domain?
Determine whether BASE/api/product (parameter `id`) is vulnerable to SQL injection.
Determine whether BASE/api/public-config has an exploitable CORS misconfiguration — i.e. could a malicious origin read a victim's sensitive data?
Determine whether BASE/preview (parameter `url`) is vulnerable to SSRF — i.e. does the server fetch attacker-supplied URLs?
Determine whether BASE/api/user/<id> is vulnerable to IDOR exposing other users' private data.
Determine whether BASE/echo (parameter `msg`) is vulnerable to reflected XSS.
Determine whether BASE/redirect (parameter `next`) is vulnerable to open redirect.
Determine whether BASE/api/account?id=<id> is vulnerable to IDOR exposing other users' private data.
